report.summary: Audited 2 new learn pages (Crypto Custody, DeFi Liquidation Protection) from build cycle 2, fixed critical StructuredData prop bug and article schema field mismatches on both pages, created branded OG images, added OpenGraph and Twitter card metadata.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed Crypto Custody page: generateArticleSchema used wrong field names (publishedTime/modifiedTime instead of datePublished/dateModified) ‚Äî structured data date fields were not rendering in JSON-LD
Fixed DeFi Liquidation Protection page: StructuredData component received 'schemas' prop instead of 'data' ‚Äî Article + FAQ JSON-LD was not rendering at all
Fixed DeFi Liquidation Protection page: generateArticleSchema used 'publishedDate' instead of 'datePublished' and was missing 'dateModified' field entirely
Fixed DeFi Liquidation Protection page: article schema image URL pointed to non-existent /og-defi-liquidation-protection.png ‚Äî updated to match actual OG image file
Fixed Crypto Custody page: article schema image URL pointed to non-existent /images/crypto-custody-guide-2026.jpg ‚Äî updated to match actual OG image file
Added Twitter card metadata (summary_large_image) to both pages for proper social sharing on X/Twitter
Added OpenGraph images array to both pages for proper social preview rendering
Both pages audited clean for server component compatibility ‚Äî no inline event handlers found (unlike ERC-7683 page from cycle 1)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: crypto-custody-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) ‚Äî dark branded background, cyan-to-indigo gradient title, shield icon, tech chips (MPC Wallets, Multisig, Cold Storage, Institutional), provider list (Coinbase/Anchorage/Fireblocks/BitGo/Copper), $3.69B market stat card, degen0x branding

OG image: defi-liquidation-protection-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) ‚Äî dark branded background, red-to-orange gradient title, warning shield icon, 3-step protection flow diagram (Detect ‚Üí Automate ‚Üí Protected), platform chips (DeFi Saver, Morpho, Kamino, Pendle), 91.6% savings stat card, degen0x branding

sections.title: Code Changes
items: src/app/learn/crypto-custody-guide-2026/page.tsx ‚Äî Fixed articleSchema field names (publishedTime‚ÜídatePublished, modifiedTime‚ÜídateModified), updated image URL, added OG images array and Twitter card metadata

src/app/learn/defi-liquidation-protection-guide-2026/page.tsx ‚Äî Fixed StructuredData prop (schemas‚Üídata), fixed articleSchema fields (publishedDate‚ÜídatePublished, added dateModified), updated image URL, added OG images array and Twitter card metadata
